headlines.title: Trump says U.S. will 'go right back to dropping bombs' if he doesn't like Iran deal
headlines.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said Wednesday at the G7 conference that the U.S. will "go right back to dropping bombs" if he doesn't like the Iran deal.

headlines.title: Carvana’s new vehicle strategy turns dealership into ‘playground,’ test-drive center with sales all online
headlines.summary: But don't expect Carvana to sell you a vehicle at one of its seven Stellantis stores, marking a stark contrast from typical franchised dealers.

headlines.title: CME Group's Terry Duffy to step down in 2027, CFO Lynne Fitzpatrick to become CEO
headlines.summary: Duffy, 67, will transition to executive chairman effective March 1, 2027, the company said Wednesday.

headlines.title: Anthropic asked for regulation. Washington went much further
headlines.summary: Anthropic has long been supportive of AI regulation, but the Trump administration is coming down particularly hard on the AI company.

headlines.title: Abercrombie & Fitch begins selling third-party shoe brands in latest bid to chase growth
headlines.summary: Abercrombie & Fitch's explosive growth has slowed, leading the apparel retailer to expand into new categories to boost sales

headlines.title: Mortgage rates are now falling but demand is still weaker
headlines.summary: A mixed week for mortgage rates resulted in less demand from both current homeowners and potential homebuyers.

headlines.title: 'Passive' investors who dodged bitcoin are now forced to own SpaceX, which is three times more volatile
headlines.summary: Many advisors and money-managers invested in index funds who will soon be owners of Elon Musk's astronomic ambitions

headlines.title: Odds that a proposed billionaire tax appears on California ballots plunge on prediction markets
headlines.summary: Odds that a proposed billionaire tax is on California's ballot dropped after reports noted that Gov. Gavin Newsom is pushing to stop the proposal.

headlines.title: Prediction market traders speculate Anthropic will restore access quickly to AI model after Trump admin directed it to limit reach
headlines.summary: Traders think it's more likely than not that access is restored by July 1.

headlines.title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.
headlines.summary: Michael Selig said that incumbents will always fear the future, but it's important to develop the new asset class domestically rather than only offshore.

headlines.title: Wall Street's fear gauge tumbles as traders bid up SpaceX shares
headlines.summary: The biggest IPO has been digested without a hiccup, and Wall Street's  so-called "fear gauge" is back below its long-term average.

headlines.title: Is the stock market open on Juneteenth? Will the post office deliver mail?
headlines.summary: The June 19 federal holiday falls on a Friday this year. Here’s how trading hours and other services are affected.

headlines.title: My mother was co-owner of my late grandmother’s bank account. Should she share the money with her siblings?
headlines.summary: “The will stated that the estate was to be divided equally among her children.”

headlines.title: America’s fertility rate has never been lower. Blame smartphones — and these 4 financial realities.
headlines.summary: Having as many children as families want requires “gender equality, economic stability, decent health and confidence in the future.”

headlines.title: Renouncing your U.S. citizenship costs just $450. But there’s a world of hidden costs, too.
headlines.summary: Before cutting legal ties to the country, consider the expenses.

headlines.title: An oil bull’s ‘insane’ bet: Why this veteran trader is buying energy stocks as crude prices tumble
headlines.summary: Former institutional trader Kevin Muir pushes against the market tide with a call to buy oil now.

headlines.title: The Great Wealth Transfer is real — but the IRS or a nursing home might get your money first
headlines.summary: From Medicaid cuts to an IRA tax trap, here are the real threats to your family’s inheritance and what to do about them.
